subcodes.first_line: The Will hath appeared, and the Dawning-Place of God's Purpose, the All-Subduing, the Self-Subsisting, hath come, manifest in human form [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد ظهرت المشیه و اتی مطلع اراده الله المهیمن القیوم و انها علی صوره الانسان
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @Primal Will and the Word; Remembrance; Manifestation of God, @spiritual transformation, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people
